title: salvia carnosa var. pilosa
intro: Salvia carnosa var. pilosa, also known as hairy-leaved sage, is a species of flowering plant in the sage family, Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Salvia carnosa var. pilosa can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and other respiratory issues.
